steps.title: Use consecutive interior angles to find y
steps.content:
Lines $q$ and $r$ are parallel, and line $s$ is a transversal. The angles 58° and $y°$ are consecutive interior angles (also called same-side interior angles), which are supplementary for parallel lines:

$$58° + y° = 180°$$

$$y = 122$$

steps.title: Substitute y into the given equation to find x
